title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at OYO Rooms - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at OYO Rooms - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
OYO Rooms invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
